mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charge_item WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY item_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge_item (item_name, item_type, price, unit) VALUES (#{itemName}, #{itemType}, #{price}, #{unit})
mapper.delete: UPDATE charge_item SET status = 0 WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charge_item WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY RAND()
